summary: Executed backend pytest regression and frontend Playwright flows for docs, navigation, filters, and admin refresh. Core requested flows pass on public URL.

ui_bugs.issue: Clicking 'Copiar clave' can trigger uncaught runtime error when clipboard permission is denied (Write permission denied).

action_items: Wrap navigator.clipboard.writeText in try/catch in ApiKeyPanel and show non-crashing fallback message when permission is denied.
Re-run UI check for copy button after fix to ensure no runtime overlay appears.
critical_code_review_comments: ApiKeyPanel.handleCopy does not handle clipboard promise rejection; unhandled exception can break UX with runtime error overlay.
Admin refresh UX is asynchronous and can take >20s; ensure loading state messaging remains clear (currently eventually succeeds).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend API endpoints /api/public-info, /api/datos, and /api/funcion(query/refresh) passed in pytest against public URL. Frontend navigation and filters (Teams/ATS with Denver) passed. Admin refresh from UI succeeds with longer wait (~25s). Only reproducible issue found: copy API key button causes uncaught runtime error in denied clipboard-permission context.
rca of the issue: Repro: Open docs page -> click [data-testid='copy-global-api-key-button'] in automation/denied-clipboard context. Result: runtime overlay + console error 'Failed to execute writeText on Clipboard: Write permission denied'. RCA: ApiKeyPanel.handleCopy awaits navigator.clipboard.writeText without try/catch, so rejected promise is unhandled. Mitigation: handle exception and show graceful feedback (e.g., fallback text selection/manual copy prompt) without throwing.
